title: getmempoolcluster RPC
description: Bitcoin Core's getmempoolcluster RPC inspects the connected mempool cluster for an in-mempool transaction, returning its transaction count, weight, and mining-ordered chunks with their fees and transactions.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 getmempoolcluster RPC
resources.notes: Canonical RPC reference for inspecting a transaction's connected cluster and mining-ordered chunks.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 Release Notes: Cluster Mempool
resources.notes: Explains the cluster-mempool model, chunk-based mining order, and the new cluster inspection RPC.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core Mempool Terminology
resources.notes: Definitions for clusters, chunks, and feerate-based ordering used by the RPC.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background for transactions, mempool behavior, fees, and Bitcoin Core developer workflows.
